response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC is 0.10 below your own share threshold (0.3), and my belief indicates I am critically depleted with only 4 hours of autonomy remaining—accepting this request would violate my minimum reserve policy and compromise my own survival margin.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.3, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Geographic neighbors are in critical distress but I am now too depleted to help safely; I must preserve my remaining energy for my own survival through the final 4 hours..
